subject: rest duration in Sporedome
fact: The party enjoys a few days of rest in Sporedome.
source_quote: The party enjoys a few days of rest in Sporedome

subject: allied factions count
fact: Four factions requested the party's assistance: the Emerald Enclave, the Harpers, the Lords' Alliance, and the Order of the Gauntlet.
source_quote: the Emerald Enclave, the Harpers, the Lords' Alliance, and the Order of the Gauntlet

subject: Ryxyg distance from Sporedome
fact: The Ryxyg illithid encampment is located several miles below Sporedome.

subject: meeting place size
fact: The meeting took place inside a hollowed-out dead mushroom roughly the size of a small house.
source_quote: roughly the size of a small house

subject: travel to rogue's lair duration
fact: The journey to the rogue mind flayer's lair takes ten days.
source_quote: Ten days of travel through the Underdark

subject: corpses count in lair
fact: Four bodies were found arranged around a table in the rogue's lair.

subject: human corpses count
fact: Three of the four bodies found in the lair were human men.

subject: drow corpse count
fact: One of the four bodies found in the lair was a drow woman.

subject: holes in skulls count
fact: Four holes were bored into the crown of each skull of the victims.
source_quote: four holes bored into the crown of each skull

subject: maps found count
fact: Detailed maps of three cities were found: Hillsfar, Phlan, and two maps of Mulmaster.
source_quote: detailed maps of Hillsfar, Phlan, and two maps of Mulmaster

subject: doors count in lair
fact: Two other doors led deeper into the lair besides the entrance.
source_quote: Two other doors led deeper into the lair

subject: journey duration reiteration
fact: The party travels for ten days to reach the destination.
source_quote: The party travels for ten days
